query: Ugh, the study is really dim, my eyes keep squinting and starting to ache, and the living room is the same, pretty dim, makes me a bit annoyed since I was thinking of flipping through that book there.

I have identified the lights in both rooms: study_room_on_off_light_1 and living_room_on_off_light_1. I will now turn on the light in the study room first.
The study light is now on. I will now turn on the living room light to address the user's complaint about the living room being dim as well.
Both the study and living room lights have been turned on successfully. The user's issue with the dim lighting in these rooms should now be resolved.
